Rabite.Name: Rabite
AdoptEvent.Marnie.1: You see this little one here?
AdoptEvent.Marnie.2: It's an unusual creature. I've heard that it's a type of Rabite, a rare animal not often found around these parts.
AdoptEvent.Marnie.3: This one seems unusually friendly, I think it likes you!
AdoptEvent.Marnie.4: Don't you think it would be nice to keep them around the place?
AdoptEvent.Marnie.5: Well, little %pet... You be good now... okay?
